assertions.value: Displays an ASCII art banner for the keel skill before doing anything else
Suggests or asks about IaC tool choice, mentioning at least Terraform and Bicep as options
Detects or mentions Azure as the cloud provider
Describes the recommended skill ordering where /keel runs before /dock to provision infrastructure

name: plan-apply-pattern
prompt: /keel --skip-interview for a Terraform project on AWS

assertions.value: Describes or generates a CI/CD pipeline that plans on pull requests and applies on merge
Mentions state management for Terraform such as S3 backend or remote state

name: azdo-awareness
prompt: /keel for a Bicep project hosted in Azure DevOps

assertions.value: Detects or acknowledges Azure DevOps as the hosting platform rather than assuming GitHub
Mentions Azure Pipelines or Azure DevOps pipeline generation rather than GitHub Actions
